supersedes: v12_FINAL_first2weeks_of_june - flawed because didnt QC operator-pump patterns
qc_methodology: Detected operator-pump patterns: consecutive UCs, UC+LC volatility within 30d, extreme 20d returns

killed_post_qc.SILVERTUC: 3 consecutive UCs + 6 UCs / 2 LCs in 30d. Classic operator pump in micro-cap.
killed_post_qc.VENUSREM: 7 UCs + 2 LCs in 30 days, +41pct in 20d. Pump-pattern flag.
killed_post_qc.COFFEEDAY: +10pct UC June 1 + 49pct return in 20d. Chase exhaustion.

final_basket.rationale: +49pct 20d momentum but ADV 146cr can exit anytime
Hit UC June 1 but -7pct over 20d is genuine pullback

exit_rules: +10pct target: book HALF + trail SL on remainder to +5pct
calibration_correction_added: Per CONSTITUTION 1.2 lead with contradiction: cross-engine consensus does NOT validate operator-pump patterns. Engine agreement on micro-caps with multi-UC streaks is correlated noise, not 4 independent signals. Future audits must include consecutive-UC detection in the QC gate.
